title: Citrusy Creamy Uruguayan Broccoli Pilaf
description: A delicious and healthy Uruguayan-inspired broccoli pilaf with a citrusy twist, perfect for a solo dinner.
instructions: 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the broccoli and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until slightly tender.
Add the chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
Add the cooked rice to the skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and add the cream, stirring constantly.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the liquid has thickened slightly.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Flamb9 the mixture with a tablespoon of white wine and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly.
Transfer the pilaf to a serving dish and garnish with lemon wedges.
Serve immediately, garnished with lemon wedges if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
